final_prompt.prompt:
Create a scientific visualization of the galactic center, combining Hubble and James Webb Space Telescope imaging styles.

Style/medium: scientific visualization / astronomical illustration, hybrid of Hubble visible-light and JWST infrared imaging aesthetics, photorealistic space photography
Composition: wide cosmic vista centered on supermassive black hole, deep field perspective showing billions of stars, gravitational lensing effects prominently featured
Subject: supermassive black hole with bright accretion disk emitting intense orange-red and white radiation, Einstein ring formed by gravitational lensing of background starlight
Scene/backdrop: Milky Way galactic core region, dense starfield with blue-white young hot stars and orange-red elderly giants, massive gas pillars extending from frame edges in red/orange/purple emission nebula colors, two distant galaxies in collision with spectacular tidal tails
Lighting/mood: intense radiation from accretion disk as primary light source, contrast between brilliant stellar objects and deep space blackness, scientifically accurate astronomical phenomena
Color palette: deep space black as base, orange-red and white from accretion disk, blue-white young stars, orange-red elderly giants, red/orange/purple emission nebulae, scattered star points
Materials/textures: glowing ionized gas, dust lanes, stellar atmospheres, warped spacetime visualization through lensing
Constraints: scientifically accurate representation of black hole physics, gravitational lensing, stellar populations, and galactic collision dynamics
Avoid: fantasy elements, non-physical lighting, 8K stuffer terms, oversaturated colors beyond scientific plausibility
